title: crinum ornatum var. careyanum
intro: Crinum ornatum var. careyanum, also known as the Tiger Lily Crinum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The medicinal properties of Crinum ornatum var. careyanum lie in its bulb, which contains alkaloids that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits associated with this plant include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Crinum ornatum var. careyanum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
